read-attribute.description: Read one or more Tango attributes and print their values

poll.description: Poll a Tango attribute on a fixed interval and stream the values

monitor.description: Stream Tango attribute change events to stdout

zip.description: Poll and zip two attributes from (possibly different) devices

snapshot.description: Read attributes from multiple devices in parallel and print a combined snapshot

stats.description: Collect N samples of double_scalar and compute min/max/mean/stddev

correlate.description: Read double_scalar and long_scalar in parallel on each tick, print both with their difference

calibrate.description: Read-transform-write pipeline with linear calibration (gain * value + offset)

alarm.description: Fan-in alarm monitor: merge N polling streams, alert when threshold is exceeded

pipeline.description: 6-step fluent TangoClient pipeline on TangoTest: read → command → calibrate → command → write → read-back

throttle.description: Poll at high frequency, display at low rate via throttleLast — shows Rx rate control

sliding-avg.description: Rolling average over a sliding window of N samples using buffer(N, 1)

running-stats.description: Live streaming min/max/mean/stddev using scan() — O(1) memory, Welford algorithm

backpressure.description: Fast producer vs slow consumer: demonstrate onBackpressureLatest/Drop/Buffer strategies

retry.description: Three retry patterns: immediate retry(n), exponential backoff retryWhen, and resilient polling loop

zip-window.description: Synchronizing multiple sources: shielded zip, combineLatest, and buffer(windowMs)+zip

verify-spec.description: Run the reactive-streams TCK against RxTangoAttribute
